title: Trade
description: A single trade record in the Trade Ops journal. Covers the full lifecycle from idea through review.

id.description: Unique trade ID. Format: YYYY-MM-DD-{SYMBOL}-{6-char-hex}. Example: 2026-04-09-NVDA-a3f1c2

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this record was first created.

state.description: Current lifecycle state for the trade record.

state_history.description: Ordered log of every state transition.

symbol.description: Ticker, token symbol, or market identifier. Examples: NVDA, SOL, TRUMP-WIN-2028.

asset_class.description: Asset class. Drives which asset_details fields are expected.

side.description: Trade direction. yes/no reserved for prediction markets.

thesis.description: Plain-language explanation of why this trade makes sense. Required before moving to planned.

plan.description: Risk box and sizing plan. All levels are in the native price unit of the instrument.

stop.description: Hard stop level. Position is invalidated if price reaches this.

reward_risk.description: Ratio of (target - entry) / (entry - stop). Calculated field.

size_units.description: Intended position size in shares, tokens, or contracts.

risk_usd.description: Maximum dollar loss if stop is hit: abs(entry - stop) * size_units.

invalidation.description: Condition that would cancel this setup before entry. Example: daily close below 200MA.

execution.description: Actual fill data, populated when state moves to open.

mode.description: Whether this was a paper or live execution.

broker.description: Execution venue. Examples: alpaca, jupiter, kalshi, manual.

exit_reason.description: How the position was closed. Examples: target-hit, stop-hit, manual, expiry, timeout.

fills.description: Individual fill records for partial entries or exits.

r_multiple.description: Actual PnL divided by planned risk. 1R = broke even on risk. 2R = doubled planned risk.

review.description: Post-trade review. Required before state moves to reviewed.

grade.description: Process quality grade — independent of PnL outcome. A = executed the plan well.

mistakes.description: Controlled mistake tags. See config/taxonomy.json for valid values.

chart_refs.description: TradingView chart links, local screenshot paths, or chart snapshot filenames.

tags.description: Freeform tags for ad hoc filtering. Use sparingly; prefer controlled fields.

notes.description: Unstructured scratchpad. Not used in review aggregations.

asset_details.description: Asset-class specific fields. Shape depends on asset_class. See schema/equity-extension.json, crypto-extension.json, prediction-extension.json.
